steps.t: Éomer is outside the Mead Hall of Eaworth. Corudan told you that Éomer, the nephew of the King, has returned from his ride north in pursuit of the Uru…
Éothain is outside the Mead Hall of Eaworth, with Éomer. Éomer has told you to ask any questions you have of his man Éothain.
Éomer is outside the Mead Hall of Eaworth. You have spoken with this lieutenant Éothain, and should now speak again with Éomer.
